step_description: Master HTML5, CSS3 layouts (Flexbox, Grid), and core JavaScript ES6+.
Learn React, hooks, state management with Redux, and Tailwind CSS.
Build RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express. Authentication and middleware.
Master MongoDB and PostgreSQL. Implement CRUD and connect frontend to backend.
Docker containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud deployment.
Python programming, statistics, probability, and SQL fundamentals.
Master Pandas, NumPy for data wrangling and exploratory analysis.
Create visualizations with Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau.
Neural networks with TensorFlow. Deploy models via APIs.
Master Python/Java. OOP, data structures, algorithms.
Build REST APIs with FastAPI. Master PostgreSQL and MongoDB.
Microservices, caching with Redis, message queues, system design.
Semantic HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, Grid, animations, responsive design.
Modern JavaScript ES6+ and TypeScript for type safety.
React, Redux, routing, and component architecture.
Testing, performance optimization, accessibility, build tools.
CNNs, RNNs, Transformers with TensorFlow and PyTorch.
Deploy models with FastAPI, Docker, cloud platforms.
IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and core AWS/Azure services.
Network protocols, OS security, core concepts.
Full-stack AI apps with React + FastAPI.
Excel for data and SQL for querying.
Python with Pandas for data manipulation.
Tableau and Power BI for dashboards.
